name: Zesty Pintos & Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) Pinto beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the oil and salsa.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Add the potato mixture to the skillet.
4. Cook for about 8 minutes, stirring frequently, until the potatoes are light brown.
5. Serve with salsa. Makes 6 servings.
